step_rationale: Bioactive sphingolipid dysregulated in atherosclerosis; promotes LDL aggregation, foam-cell formation, and atherosclerotic progression.
mechanism: Ceramide is a pro-atherogenic bioactive lipid that drives altered lipid metabolism, LDL aggregation, foam-cell formation and atherosclerotic plaque progression.
